info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Oracle WebLogic Monitoring and Diagnostics API
Domain Runtime
Oracle WebLogic Server Get domain runtime information

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns the root of the domain runtime tree, providing access to domain-wide monitoring data including all server runtimes.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server List all server runtimes

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns runtime information for all running servers in the domain including state, health, and performance data.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get runtime for a specific server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns runtime information for the specified running server.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server List partition runtimes

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns runtime status for all partitions in the domain.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get runtime for a specific partition

params.name: partitionName
params.description: Name of the domain partition

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Get runtime for a specific partition

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get partition lifecycle runtime

params.name: partitionName
params.description: Name of the domain partition

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Get partition lifecycle runtime

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Start a partition

params.name: partitionName
params.description: Name of the domain partition

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Start a partition

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Stop a partition

params.name: partitionName
params.description: Name of the domain partition

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Stop a partition

info.name: Server Runtime
Oracle WebLogic Server Get current server runtime

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns the runtime information for the server receiving this request. Available on both admin and managed servers.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get the URL for a server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Returns the URL for accessing the specified server using the given protocol.

info.name: Server Lifecycle
Oracle WebLogic Server List all server lifecycle runtimes

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns lifecycle state for all servers in the domain including their current state (RUNNING, SHUTDOWN, STANDBY, etc.).

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get lifecycle runtime for a specific server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Get lifecycle runtime for a specific server

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Start a managed server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Starts the specified managed server. This is an asynchronous operation that returns a task for monitoring progress.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Shut down a managed server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Gracefully shuts down the specified managed server.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Force shut down a managed server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Immediately shuts down the specified server without waiting for graceful completion.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Suspend a managed server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Suspends the specified server, placing it in admin mode.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Resume a suspended server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Resumes a server that was previously suspended, returning it to running state.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Restart SSL on a server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

items.docs: Restarts the SSL subsystem on the specified server.

info.name: Application Runtime
Oracle WebLogic Server List application deployment runtimes

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

params.name: links
params.description: Comma-separated list of link relations to include. Use 'none' to exclude all links.

items.docs: Returns runtime status for all deployed applications in the domain.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Get runtime for a specific application

params.name: appName
params.description: Name of the deployed application

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

items.docs: Oracle WebLogic Server Get runtime for a specific application

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Start a deployed application

params.name: appName
params.description: Name of the deployed application

items.docs: Starts the specified application across its configured targets.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Stop a deployed application

params.name: appName
params.description: Name of the deployed application

items.docs: Stops the specified application across its configured targets.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server List application runtimes on a server

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

items.docs: Returns runtime information for all applications deployed on the specified server.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server List component runtimes for an application

params.name: serverName
params.description: Name of the WebLogic Server instance

params.name: appName
params.description: Name of the deployed application

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated list of property names to include

items.docs: Returns runtime information for all components (web modules, EJBs) within the specified application on the specified server.

info.name: Runtime Search
Oracle WebLogic Server Search the domain runtime tree

params.name: requestMaxWaitMillis
params.description: Maximum time in milliseconds to wait for search results

items.docs: Performs a structured query against the domain runtime tree. Supports field filtering, child traversal, collection filtering, and result merging across servers.

info.name: Oracle WebLogic Server Search the server runtime tree

items.docs: Performs a structured query against the current server's runtime tree.

info.name: Tasks
Oracle WebLogic Server Get status of an asynchronous task

params.name: taskId
params.description: Task identifier

items.docs: Returns the current status of an asynchronous operation. Used to poll for completion of long-running operations like server start/stop.
